THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 22, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ARMEN VARTANIAN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED WITH THIRTY FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND (OCTOBER 10, 2012). LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED TO NAME THE BANKRUPTCY TRUSTEE AS THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST OR TO ALLEGE THAT THE BANKRUPTCY TRUSTEE HAS WAIVED THE RIGHT TO PROCEED WITH THIS CASE AND THE RIGHT TO DO SO HAS BEEN RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF . IF THIS IS NOT DONE, THEN MR. VARTANIAN MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR DISMISSAL OF THE ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ARMEN VARTANIAN's Motion To Tax Plaintiff's Memorandum Of Costs is continued to June 3, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: stacie l. morris, esq., law offices of paul j. steiner, 415.981.6100, for plaintiff martino pistone.
tiffany day, esq., kern, noda, devine & segal, 415.474.1900, for defendant armen vartanian.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification: DEFENDANT ARMEN VARTANIAN's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Granted with thirty five days leave to amend (October 10, 2012). Leave to amend is granted to name the bankruptcy trustee as the real party in interest or to allege that the bankruptcy trustee has waived the right to proceed with this case and the right to do so has been restored to plaintiff . If this is not done, then Mr. Vartanian may apply ex parte for dismissal of the action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
